description: Text input field with label, placeholder, left/right icons, validation state icons (success/error), error message, help text, and full keyboard event support.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Current text value.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the value changes.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label shown above the input.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text.

parameters.name: Error
parameters.description: Validation error message. Shows error styling when set.

parameters.name: HelpText
parameters.description: Help text shown below the input when no error is present.

parameters.name: LeftIcon
parameters.description: Icon name for the leading icon slot.

parameters.name: RightIcon
parameters.description: Icon name for the trailing icon slot.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: HTML input type. Defaults to "text".

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: HTML id attribute. Defaults to a generated unique id.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the input.

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Makes the input read-only.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the input as required.

parameters.name: TabIndex
parameters.description: Tab index.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Auto-focuses the input on render.

parameters.name: ShowValidationIcons
parameters.description: When true, shows validation icons (checkmark for valid, error for invalid).

parameters.name: IsValid
parameters.description: Validation state: true = valid (green), false = invalid (red), null = neutral.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) to apply to the input element.

parameters.name: AutoComplete
parameters.description: HTML autocomplete attribute. Common values: "on", "off", "name", "email", "tel", "address", "username", "new-password", "current-password", etc.

parameters.name: OnKeyDown
parameters.description: Fires when a key is pressed down.

parameters.name: OnKeyUp
parameters.description: Fires when a key is released.

parameters.name: OnKeyPress
parameters.description: Fires when a key is pressed.

parameters.name: OnFocus
parameters.description: Fires when the input receives focus.

parameters.name: OnBlur
parameters.description: Fires when the input loses focus.

examples.title: Input with validation error
examples.code: <TmTextInput @bind-Value="email" Label="Email" Type="email" Error="Please enter a valid email address" LeftIcon="@IconNames.Mail" />

examples.title: Input with validation icons
examples.code: <TmTextInput @bind-Value="username" Label="Username" ShowValidationIcons="true" IsValid="@isUsernameValid" HelpText="Must be at least 3 characters" />
